description: A web-based user interface for visualizing and browsing database schemas and data. It includes components such as database list, table list, and data tables with dynamic data loading, expandable cells, and user interaction handling.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases and updates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list, resets current selections, and updates the UI.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Handles expanding/collapsing database entries and initiates table loading.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads and displays tables for the selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads data from a specific table and renders it in the main view.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates HTML for the data table with headers and rows.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual cells, handling nulls, objects, and long strings with expandable functionality.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses a cell to show full content or truncated view.
